**UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES**
**Periodic Transaction Report**

- **Name:** Rohit Khanna
- **Office Telephone:** (202) 225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: ______ (File an original and 1 copy)
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? Yes [ ]  No [X]
- Please indicate whether this is an initial report or an amended report: [X] Initial Report  [ ] Amendment
- Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)

**Filing stamp:** Legislative Resource Center / 18 FEB 11 PM 9:15 / Office of the Clerk, U.S. House of Representatives / HAND DELIVERED (For Official Use Only)

**Notice:** A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.

Transaction grid body: "Please see the attached" (no data rows on cover; example row is the greyed "Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock").
